titleStmt.title: SII 42.140: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 140. (A.R. No. 3 of 1955-56.) Mēḍikurti, Vayalpad Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Lakshmīnarasiṁha temple.
Dated Śaka 1530, Kīlaka, Kārtika, śu. 15, corresponding to 1608 A.D., November 11, Friday. (In the A.R. for 1955-56, the Śaka year was wrongly noted as 1533).

Registers that the vidvan-mahājanas, the village officials and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Kōnēṭi Timmarājayyadēva mahārāja agreed among themselves that the levy of grain at a specified rate collected on all the lands in the village, be utilized for maintaining the tanks, ponds and the canals of the village in the proportion of the irrigated areas under each of them.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayādbhu(bhyu)daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1530 Agunēṭi kīlaka saṁ
vatsara kā¨rtika śu 12 lu śrīmatu yajanayājanā[di ṣaṭka¨rmma] niratulaina mēḍiku¨rtiki pratināmamaina lakṣmīnārāyaṇapu
ramagrahārasthitāśēṣa vidvanmahājanālunnu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju kōnēṭi timmarājayyadēva mahā
rājulugārunnu yīgrāmaṁ kāṁpu karaṇālunnu sthānamānyālavārunnu gollaveṁkarivārunnu pallepaṭṭeḷlavārunnu sahitaṁgā
nu yī tithi puṇyakālamaṁdu voppivēyiṁcina dha¨rmaśāsanamu . ceruvulanu kuṁṭalanu kāluvalanu catussīmanunnuyē
Imaḍi kaddu Aṁttamaḍikinni kōru guttamānyālaku sahāgānu maḍi É1 ki vaḍlu É1 lekhanu kōrumaḍiki vubhayarāsinini guttama
ḍiki kāpupālilōnunnu mānyā(nya)gāṁḍlu tamamaḍi mīda vaḍlunnu yī tīruna dhānyaṁ yettipedda ceruvu kāluvalakiṁdi maḍikinni vacci
na dhānyaṁ pedaceruvu panikinni kaṭukāluvapanikinni yaye(ĒĒ) ceruvulakiṁda vaccina vaḍlu Āyā ceruvulamīda vēśi Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu panulu
śēyiṁcakalavāru [.] yī maryāda tappi Āpanulu sēyiṁcaka śīma yēlēvāru vūru yēlēvāru paṭṭina gāna grāmālu kāpu karaṇālu mānyālavāru yiyyaka dho(dhā)tu
¨rvādāla pōyināgāni vāri tallitaṁḍṟlanu biḍḍalanu guruvulanu gōvulanu brāhmalanu vāraṇāśilō vadhiṁccina pāpāna pōvuvāru [.] vāri mānā
bhimānālu caṁḍālulaku yiccinavāru [.] Iṭlāguna voppivēyiṁcina dha¨rmaśāsanamu [.] yī śāsanamu vēyiṁcina vāru satyē(tte)na pegaḍa raṁggayya
lu rācakaraṇaṁ mālyavaṁttaṁ kōnamarasu vēyiṁccina dha¨rma śāsanamu . śrī śrī śrī jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 42.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
